scope: simulated cache hierarchy study; not hardware counter measurement

results.name: hot_working_set
results.description: Small repeated working set with high L1 locality.

results.name: mixed_locality
results.description: Moderate locality with partial L2 reuse.

results.name: streaming_access
results.description: Large streaming access pattern with reduced cache reuse.

results.name: pointer_chasing
results.description: Pointer-heavy pattern with poor locality and high memory access pressure.
